# Nano Indentation

**Summary**: A technique used to measure the hardness and Young's modulus of materials at the micron scale.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alvayed|Alvayed, 2024]] applied nano-indentation to determine mechanical properties across a wide range of values (7-85 GPa).

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Revealed a bimodal distribution in Young's modulus, indicating two distinct phases (soft and hard) at the nanoscale. ([[2024-alvayed|Alvayed, 2024, p. 52]])
